summary: HotelRunner Channel Manager Integration - All 5 backend pytest tests pass (100%). Frontend /hotelrunner page renders correctly with all 5 tabs. Connection form displays Token, HR_ID fields and 'Baglan' (Connect) button. Ruff lint passes with 0 errors.
critical_code_review_comments: HotelRunnerProvider: Production-grade implementation with rate limiting (5 req/min, 250 req/day)
hotelrunner_router.py: Full REST API with 16 endpoints covering connection, rooms, reservations, mappings, channels, sync-logs, and usage stats
HotelRunnerIntegration.jsx: Clean React component with 5 tabs (Baglanti, Odalar, Rezervasyonlar, Eslemeler, Loglar)
All data-testid attributes present for automated testing
Proper error handling and Turkish localization
seed_data_creation: No seed data - HotelRunner is not connected (no credentials)
context_for_next_testing_agent: HotelRunner integration at /hotelrunner. All APIs return disconnected/empty state until real HotelRunner sandbox credentials are configured. Frontend shows connection form with Token + HR_ID fields. Backend router registered in bootstrap/router_registry.py.

connect_invalid.note: Returns 400 with invalid token (HotelRunner API rejects)

mocked_apis_note: HotelRunner external API is NOT mocked. Internal endpoints tested only. Connect endpoint returns 400 as expected when invalid credentials are sent to real HotelRunner API.
